description: Tabbed content switcher with accessible keyboard navigation. Each direct light-DOM child with a data-tab-label attribute becomes a tab. The component creates shadow-DOM tab buttons from a cloning prototype and manages panel visibility by setting data-tab-active on the matching child.

attributes.name: data-active-tab
attributes.description: Zero-based index of the selected tab

slots.description: Default slot for tab panel children (each must have data-tab-label)

events.name: tab-change
events.description: Fired when the active tab changes

methods.name: selectTab(index)
methods.description: Programmatically select a tab by index
